title: Kilner Replacement Rubber Seals Pack of 6 Airtight Food-Safe Seals for Round and Square Clip Top Jars (0.35 L to 2 Litre) Durable, Reusable, and Ideal for Preserving and Storage
features: KILNER REPLACEMENT RUBBER SEALS | Designed for Kilner Round and Square Clip Top Jars in sizes ranging from 0.35L to 2L, these high-quality rubber seals ensure an airtight closure to preserve freshness.
VERSATILE FIT | Compatible with multiple jar sizes: 0.35L, 0.5L, 1L, 1.5L, and 2L, making them ideal for a wide range of preserving and storage needs.
DURABILITY | Crafted from premium food-safe rubber, these seals are durable, reusable, and perfect for extending the life of your Kilner jars.
CARE AND USE | Hand wash only and sterilise before use to maintain optimal sealing performance and food safety standards.

THE KILNER STORY | Trusted for over 180 years, Kilner combines heritage and innovation to offer simple, sustainable solutions for food storage and preservation with iconic designs and high-quality materials.
